deltas.releaseNoteText: Three new props — `editPlaceholder`, `editCommentPlaceholder`, and `editReplyPlaceholder` — let you override the placeholder text in the edit composer on `VeltComments`, `VeltCommentDialog`, `VeltCommentsSidebar`, and `VeltInlineCommentsSection`. Props set on the root container propagate to all dialogs automatically.
deltas.summary: Add three new edit-composer placeholder props (editPlaceholder, editCommentPlaceholder, editReplyPlaceholder) to the placeholder prop table; document priority order and which components accept them.

details.signature: editPlaceholder?: string; editCommentPlaceholder?: string; editReplyPlaceholder?: string;

parameters.name: editPlaceholder
parameters.description: Fallback placeholder shown in the edit composer for any comment or reply

parameters.name: editCommentPlaceholder
parameters.description: Placeholder when editing the first comment in a thread (index 0). Takes precedence over editPlaceholder

parameters.name: editReplyPlaceholder
parameters.description: Placeholder when editing a reply (index > 0). Takes precedence over editPlaceholder

details.codeExample:
// React — set on root VeltComments; propagates to all dialogs automatically
<VeltComments
  editPlaceholder="Edit your message…"
  editCommentPlaceholder="Edit the original comment…"
  editReplyPlaceholder="Edit your reply…"
/>

// HTML
<velt-comments
  edit-placeholder="Edit your message…"
  edit-comment-placeholder="Edit the original comment…"
  edit-reply-placeholder="Edit your reply…"
></velt-comments>

// Priority order: editCommentPlaceholder / editReplyPlaceholder > editPlaceholder > existing placeholder prop > SDK defaults

deltas.releaseNoteText: Added download buttons for image and other file attachments in the edit comment dialog.
deltas.targetSection: V2-Migrated Component Families table / primitive counts
deltas.summary: Document two new attachment download primitives (VeltCommentDialogComposerAttachmentsImageDownload and VeltCommentDialogComposerAttachmentsOtherDownload) available for wireframe customization in the edit-mode comment dialog composer; non-wireframe users get the download buttons automatically.

parameters.name: annotationId
parameters.description: The annotation ID for the attachment context

deltas.releaseNoteText: Confirm dialog now uses variant CSS classes for comment and reply deletes, enabling easier styling.
deltas.summary: Document the new confirm-dialog variant CSS modifier classes (velt-confirm-dialog--comment, velt-confirm-dialog--reply, velt-confirm-dialog--{type}) added automatically based on the optional type field in ConfirmDialogComponentConfig.

details.signature: CSS modifier classes: velt-confirm-dialog--comment | velt-confirm-dialog--reply | velt-confirm-dialog--{type}

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional field in ConfirmDialogComponentConfig. SDK sets 'comment' or 'reply' automatically; a custom string produces velt-confirm-dialog--{type}; omitting type applies no modifier.

skipped.releaseNoteText: Rewriter dialog now uses the new `askAi` method with `gpt-5.4` and avoids duplicate suggestions.
skipped.reason: Rewriter is an internal AI dialog feature with no dedicated Rewriter skill library. The migration from getRewriterOptions to askAi is an internal implementation change; getChatGPTInput and removeChatGPTPlaceholders are removed from RewriterService (internal class not documented in any skill rule). No mapped skill library exists for this feature.

skipped.releaseNoteText: Assignee banner now shows correctly for 'checkbox' assign types.
skipped.reason: Bug fix with no API or behavior change — does not qualify as a skill delta.

skipped.releaseNoteText: Switching composer contexts now properly focuses the textarea in sidebar mode.
skipped.reason: Bug fix with no API or behavior change — does not qualify as a skill delta.

skipped.releaseNoteText: Replying in `VeltInlineCommentsSection` now fires the `addComment` event as expected.
skipped.reason: Bug fix restoring documented event behavior — does not qualify as a skill delta.
